page: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v6 is a dedicated virtual machine belonging to the DCEV6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This server features 4 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable to support high-performance disk configurations.

The hardware profile presents specific architectural tradeoffs. While categorized within a memory-optimized family, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio aligns closely with general-purpose configurations. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention, though the lack of integrated local storage and GPU hardware limits its use for data-intensive local caching or hardware-accelerated workloads. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated resource allocation and Premium Storage compatibility provide a stable foundation for enterprise workloads without the overhead of local disk maintenance.

This server configuration is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and moderate memory capacity. Suitable use cases include relational databases utilizing external Premium Storage, application servers, containerized microservices, and general-purpose enterprise applications that do not require local scratch space or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEV6 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external disks. With zero GPUs and a dedicated CPU allocation, the server offers stable, predictable compute performance. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced resource profile. This configuration is suitable for database hosting, application servers, and containerized workloads that rely on external storage systems rather than local ephemeral disks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v6 is a dedicated x86_64 virtual machine with 4 Intel vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for workloads requiring predictable compute resources.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 virtual machine featuring balanced compute and memory resources with premium external storage compatibility.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
16.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Premium Storage capable with no local ephemeral storage
Designed for databases, application servers, and containerized workloads
